anuvellita a. [vell-kta] Bent in conformity with; bent under.
— taṃ Securing with bandages, bandaging;
(pb) a sort of bandage (vraṇalepanabaṃdhabhedaḥ) one of the 14 kinds mentioned by Suśruta.
